analysis.reasoning: Core message: The EU supports UN Women, has positively impacted women and girls, and must prevent COVID-19 from rolling back their rights. Evaluation by narrative: EU1 (successful story) – implied pride and positive impact, but not about EU’s historical success or learning from past; not a fit. EU2 (united) – no mention of intra-EU unity; not supported. EU3 (useful for its citizens) – focus is on women and girls broadly and via UN Women, not specifically on EU internal citizens’ benefits; not applicable. EU4 (avant-garde actor) – no claim of pioneering regulation/leadership in future challenges; not evident. EU5 (global champion of fair causes) – explicitly highlights EU leadership/support for gender rights and preventing backsliding; aligns well. EU6 (contributes to a better world) – shows EU contributing globally through partnership with UN Women to improve lives and uphold rights; aligns. Conclusion: EU5 and EU6 are promoted.
